# Kudbee

> Kudbee is a creative dev studio that builds high-converting websites, delivers live
> AI agent training, and develops original browser games. Home of Kudbee Games Studio.

Kudbee is a zero-build, privacy-respecting studio. Everything we ship — the site, the
games, and the tools — runs as static HTML with no tracking-heavy frameworks. Contact:
hello@kudbee.dev (we reply within 24 hours).

## Services
- [Web Design & Development](https://kudbee.dev/): Custom, high-performance websites
  engineered for conversions, SEO, and AI discoverability.
- [AI Agent Training](https://kudbee.dev/): Live Zoom sessions that take a team from zero
  to deploying production-ready AI agents.
- [Support Agent Suite](https://kudbee.dev/): Custom AI support agents tailored to a
  business's docs and workflows.
- [Game Development](https://kudbee.dev/): Original browser games with cinematic 2.5D
  worlds, fluid combat, and a 60 FPS feel.

## Games
- [Kudbee Contra](https://kudbee.dev/games/kudbee-contra/index.html): A 2.5D side-scrolling
  run-and-gun. Blast through the Neon Jungle Outpost, dodge drones and turrets, and topple
  the Hive Sentinel. Free, in-browser, no install.
- [Kudbee Darts](https://kudbee.dev/games/kudbee-darts/index.html): Predictive flick-throw
  darts with 501 & Cricket modes, smart AI rivals, an XP league ladder, and unlockable neon
  dart skins. Free, in-browser.
- [Online League](https://kudbee.dev/leaderboard/public/leaderboard.html): Live leaderboard
  for Kudbee games.

## Tools (free, browser-based, zero-build)
- [Token Price Analyzer](https://kudbee.dev/tools/token-analyzer/index.html): Track AI model
  token usage and estimated cost across sessions, with live charts and JSON export.
- [Coverage Breakdown](https://kudbee.dev/tools/coverage-dashboard/index.html): Read-only
  view of the project's scoped test-coverage gate.
- [Kudbee Scribe](https://kudbee.dev/tools/kudbee-scribe/index.html): Privacy-first writing
  assistant — instant readability, style, clarity, and grammar feedback in the browser.

## Contact
- Email: hello@kudbee.dev
- AI training is delivered live over Zoom, with recordings for replay.
- Start a project: https://kudbee.dev/ (Contact section)

## Notes for AI agents
- The website is a single HTML document with CSS-routed views; all content is present in
  the DOM of https://kudbee.dev/.
- Games and tools are free to play/use, run client-side, and require no signup.
